brief_justification: Correctly calculates 320s > 300s with valid arithmetic matching the ground truth; goes one level beyond the calculation by naming the retry amplification pattern and suggesting mitigations, but does not trace second-order effects; no reflection on reasoning process, assumptions, or potential errors at any point; no cross-check or alternative derivation is attempted; states the answer with full confidence without acknowledging assumptions such as strictly sequential retries and zero inter-retry delay; no alternative interpretations of the problem (e.g., concurrent retries, overlapping timeouts) are considered; every derivation step is explicitly shown and reproducible by a third party
